title: Multicultural Young Adults' Views on Multiculturalism in Finland 2020
description: This dataset consists of texts written by multicultural young adults on their perceptions and experiences of cultural pluralism in Finland. The invitation to write aimed to reach young adults aged 35 and under and whose parents came from different cultures. The writing guidelines directed the participants to discuss their multicultural everyday life in Finland.
